description: Creates consultant-grade, task- and site-specific job safety analyses (JSA / JHA — job hazard analysis). Use this skill whenever a user asks to build or review a JSA, JHA, or job hazard analysis, break a job or task into steps and assess the hazards of each step, perform a task-step risk analysis, or produce a step-by-step safe-work analysis for a specific physical job — in manufacturing, oil & gas, construction, or mining. It decomposes the job into its ordered steps, identifies the hazards of each step, scores each step on the org's risk matrix, ranks controls by the hierarchy of controls per step (no PPE-only steps without justification), re-scores residual risk per step, and assigns SMART corrective actions with named owners and due dates — emitting a branded JSA report. For a whole-activity risk assessment use the risk-assessment skill; to investigate an event that occurred use incident-investigation. Decision-support only; a competent person must review the output.
name: job-safety-analysis
